description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. The letsencrypt-renew job runs on the scottchayaa/alpine-certbot:3.7 Docker image, triggers only on scheduled pipelines, configures git user.name and user.email from $GITLAB_USER_LOGIN and $GITLAB_USER_EMAIL, makes the scripts in ./letsencrypt executable, and executes ./letsencrypt/renew.sh while exposing DOMAIN, GITLAB_API_TOKEN and RENEW_DAYS_THRESHOLD variables. The pages job runs on the monachus/hugo:v0.75.0 image, triggers only on the master branch, runs 'hugo version' then 'hugo' to build the site, and publishes the generated public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after one day. Both jobs use the default stage.
